blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,710 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.1" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 14.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 39".
